_meta.game: Star Wars: Empire at War - Forces of Corruption
_meta.methodology: Classes grouped by keyword matching on short name, demangled name, and inheritance chains (all_bases). First-match-wins priority ordering: combat > AI > movement > abilities > economy > story > multiplayer > UI > units > map/terrain > behaviors > engine_core > lua > save/load > audio/visual > uncategorized. C++ stdlib, MSVC CRT, and IDA switch-table artifacts are pre-filtered into engine_core.

trainer_relevance_key.high: Directly useful for trainer/mod development (memory values to read/write, behaviors to hook)
trainer_relevance_key.medium: Useful for context and advanced mods but not primary trainer targets
trainer_relevance_key.low: Engine internals or infrastructure; rarely targeted directly

subsystems.name: combat_damage
subsystems.description: Damage, armor, shields, weapons, hardpoints, projectiles, health, and combat resolution

subsystems.name: ai_perception
subsystems.description: AI decision-making, perception systems, evaluators, goals, budgets, and combatant logic

subsystems.name: movement_locomotor
subsystems.description: Locomotors, movement controllers, pathfinding, navigation, and position events

subsystems.name: abilities
subsystems.description: Special abilities, ability classes, and their associated data packs

subsystems.name: economy_resources
subsystems.description: Credits, production queues, build pads, reinforcement, and resource management

subsystems.name: story_campaign
subsystems.description: Story scripting, campaign progression, galactic conquest events, and mission flow

subsystems.name: multiplayer_steam
subsystems.description: Steam integration, lobby management, peer networking, and multiplayer session handling

subsystems.name: ui_display
subsystems.description: HUD elements, dialogs, GUI components, radar, tooltips, text rendering, and reticles

subsystems.name: units_objects
subsystems.description: Game object types, squads, units, fleets, transports, and entity management

subsystems.name: map_terrain
subsystems.description: Map systems, planets, terrain rendering, space/land/galactic modes, and Alamo renderer internals

subsystems.name: behaviors
subsystems.description: Behavior classes and generic data-pack classes not covered by other subsystems

subsystems.name: engine_core
subsystems.description: Singletons, reference counting, pooled objects, dynamic vectors, schedulers, CRT/stdlib, and core event plumbing

subsystems.name: lua_scripting
subsystems.description: Lua VM integration, script commands, console commands, and Lua variable wrappers

subsystems.name: save_load
subsystems.description: Save/load persistence, serialization, and game-state snapshot systems

subsystems.name: audio_visual
subsystems.description: Sound effects, music, movie playback, Bink video, particles, lasers, and render tasks

subsystems.name: uncategorized
subsystems.description: Classes not matched by any subsystem heuristic
